recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.noRecipes: No recipes found. Add your first recipe to get started!
recipes.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"?

addRecipe.imageDescription: Upload an image of a recipe to extract its details automatically
addRecipe.urlDescription: Enter a URL to a recipe webpage to extract its details automatically
addRecipe.dragDrop: Drag 'n' drop an image here, or click to select one
addRecipe.imageFormats: Supported formats: PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF, WEBP
addRecipe.extracting: Extracting recipe... This might take a moment.
addRecipe.extractingMoment: Please wait while we process your recipe
addRecipe.errorExtracting: An error occurred while extracting the recipe. Please try again.
addRecipe.switchToUrl: Prefer to add from a URL?
addRecipe.switchToImage: Prefer to add from an image?

editRecipe.title: Edit Recipe
editRecipe.servingsHint: Uncheck for recipes where servings don't apply (e.g., cakes, breads)
editRecipe.tagsHint: Separate tags with commas (e.g., dessert, chocolate, easy)
editRecipe.noIngredients: No ingredients. Click "Add Ingredient" to add one.
editRecipe.noInstructions: No instructions. Click "Add Instruction" to add one.

auth.signInHint: Only authorized superadmins can access this application
auth.unauthorizedMessage: You must be signed in as a superadmin to access this page

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
notFound.culinaryTagline: This one got lost in the kitchen.

homepage.title: Recipe Book
homepage.subtitle: Your intelligent recipe collection powered by AI

imageExtraction.title: Extract from Images
imageExtraction.description: Upload photos, screenshots, or images of recipes and let AI extract all the details automatically.

urlExtraction.title: Extract from URLs
urlExtraction.description: Simply paste a recipe URL and our AI will extract the recipe information from the webpage.

aiPowered.title: AI-Powered
aiPowered.description: Powered by advanced AI to accurately extract ingredients, instructions, and cooking details from any source.

organized.title: Organized Collection
organized.description: Manage your recipes with search, tags, and filters. Scale ingredients, edit details, and keep everything organized.

cta.loggedOut: Sign in to start building your recipe collection
